definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="return_string"><value name="return"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Demons are a warlike race with a long history of infighting, they follow a hierarchical structure where weaker demons would pledge themselves to a more powerful demon, either for protection or because they valued strength.</field></block></value></block></next></block></xml>
